Cooking: Don't forget turkey in the oven
Richard's Journal: How am I experiencing this moment of being alive?
It is possible to be actually free, here on earth, as this body, in this lifetime
To be here now, intimately here in this moment in time, is a satisfaction and fulfilment unparalleled
This moment is ever-fresh, perennially new — it has never happened before and will never happen again
Actual intimacy is a direct experiencing of the other
The immediate is the ultimate and the relative is the absolute
One has always been here — one has never been anywhere else
Life was meant to be easy
Pure intent is a palpable life-force — an actually occurring stream of benignity
A wide and wondrous path of blitheness and gaiety is now available
What a shame, what a pity — no, what a sin it is to be disconsolate when this world is so glorious
Actual perfection and excellence is the goal of life
Pure intent produces total dedication — it makes it impossible not to do what is required
I find myself here, in the world as-it-is. A vast stillness lies all around, abounding with purity
Beneficence, an active kindness, overflows in all directions, imbuing everything with fairytale-like quality
There is no distance between me and the actual world — all is open to view
Being here now is doing what is happening
The universe does not force anyone to be happy and harmless — it is a matter of personal choice
Purity far exceeds beauty — purity has never known malice and sorrow and never will
This actual world is an ambrosial paradise
All this being alive business is actually happening and we are totally involved in living it out
It is a bold step to enter the actuality of life as a sensate experience — it requires a startling audacity
Here in this actual world is the peace that everyone says they are searching for
I am this universe experiencing itself as a sensate human being
This moment lives me — rather than 'I' living in the present
